testcase.name: test_create_klant
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gratis_factuur.py:207: in test_create_klant assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Internal server error: [TypeError(\"'ObjectId' object is not iterable\"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_facturen_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gratis_factuur.py:405: in test_get_facturen_list assert len(data) >= 1 E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_create_partial_payment
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_gratis_factuur.py:508: in auth_session_with_factuur klant_id = klant_response.json()["klant"]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'klant'
